h1: LG Front Load Washer 15 kg, AI DD™ Fabric Care with Steam — TurboWash™ 39, Allergy Care, LG ThinQ Wi-Fi + Voice, Slim-Standard Depth, Essence White (WFN1510WHT)

gallery.a: Front view of LG WFN1510WHT 15 kg front load washer in Essence White
Front view with door open revealing the stainless-steel drum
Close-up of the 15 kg stainless-steel drum
LED display and dial control panel close-up
Back view showing water connection ports

modules.head: XL 15 kg drum in an LG-standard 660 mm depth cabinet
modules.body: The WFN1510WHT packs a spacious 15 kg drum into an LG-standard depth chassis — reclaim valuable laundry-room space without compromising how much you can wash in one cycle.
modules.disc: *Compared with LG WXL10-14 (W650 × H940 × D770). Video used for illustration.

imgs.a: Slim-standard depth cabinet fits tighter laundry rooms

modules.eye: Fit More of the Good Stuff In
modules.head: One wash, big bedding loads
modules.body: Tackle a king-size duvet, curtains or a full family wash in a single cycle — fewer loads means less energy, less water, and more of your day back.

modules.eye: Intelligent Fabric Care with AI DD®
modules.head: AI Direct Drive senses, selects, protects
modules.body: AI DD® weighs each load and reads fabric softness, then automatically picks the optimal wash motion from 6 Motion Direct Drive — delivering up to 18% better fabric protection than standard motion.
modules.disc: *Based on LG internal testing vs. Normal cycle.

imgs.a: AI detects fabric weight and adjusts motion

modules.head: Fresh Laundry in just 39 minutes
modules.body: TurboWash™ 39 sprays water in four directions to rinse detergent through fabrics thoroughly and quickly — a full wash-and-rinse in as little as 39 minutes for everyday loads.

imgs.a: Multi-directional spray for fast, thorough wash

modules.head: Reduce household allergens with true Steam
modules.body: The Allergy Care™ cycle uses true Steam to penetrate fabrics and help reduce common household allergens — certified by the British Allergy Foundation for bedding, soft toys and baby laundry.

modules.head: Inverter Direct Drive — quieter by design
modules.body: The Inverter Direct Drive motor replaces belts and pulleys with fewer moving parts, reducing noise and vibration so sensitive loads can run day or night. Backed by a 10-year motor warranty.
modules.disc: *10-year Inverter Direct Drive motor warranty. Terms apply.

modules.head: Start, monitor and diagnose — from your phone
modules.body: Launch a wash remotely, get end-of-cycle alerts and run Smart Diagnosis troubleshooting through the LG ThinQ® app. Hands-free voice control with Amazon Alexa and Google Assistant.

modules.head: Glossy Essence White finish, minimalist lines
modules.body: Finished in Essence White (Glossy) with a black-tinted tempered-glass door and clean LED display, the WFN1510WHT is styled to sit at home in both modern and traditional interiors.

imgs.a: Premium Essence White finish with tempered glass door

modules.head: Stainless Steel Drum + Tempered Glass Door
modules.body: A corrosion-resistant stainless-steel drum paired with durable black-tinted tempered-glass delivers long-term reliability and a premium feel — ready for thousands of washes to come.

imgs.a: Stainless steel drum and tempered glass

specs.v: Dial + Full Touch Buttons & LED Display
